news.t: AllianceBernstein Launches Five New Active ETFs

overview.description: The AB Corporate Bond ETF (EYEG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in USD-denominated, investment grade corporate bonds of any maturity or duration. EYEG was launched on Dec 13, 2023 and is issued by AB Funds.

data.title: AllianceBernstein Launches Five New Active ETFs
data.text: Lineup includes one Buffered product and four Fixed Income products in AB's ETF suite NASHVILLE, Tenn. , Dec. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- AllianceBernstein Holding L.P.
